highlights_headline: SkiaSharp 4.151.0-unreleased merges upstream Skia m151 bug fixes and ports two colour-conversion hot paths to managed code.
highlights_body: SKColor-to-SKColorF conversion and SKPMColor premultiply/unpremultiply now run entirely in managed integer math, eliminating P/Invoke round-trips. The WASM target gains an exception-handling regression test and the emsdk 5.0.6 exnref libraries.

bullets.lead: Upstream Skia m151 bug fixes merged
bullets.detail: Syncs the latest upstream chrome/m151 bug fixes into the bundled Skia renderer.
Restores SK_ENABLE_LEGACY_SHADERCONTEXT so CPU-rasterised surfaces produce correct output after the m151 sync.

bullets.lead: SKColor-to-SKColorF conversion ported to managed math
bullets.detail: The hot-path SKColor → SKColorF conversion now runs in managed C# integer arithmetic, removing a P/Invoke round-trip on every call.

bullets.lead: SKPMColor premultiply/unpremultiply ported to managed math
bullets.detail: Single-value premultiply and unpremultiply operations now use managed integer math instead of native calls, reducing interop overhead.
Builds the emsdk 5.0.6 static libraries with new exnref exception handling, and adds a preview-.NET WASM test job to catch exception-handling regressions.
